creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
Around June 2008 (no PR referenced), the www/trac port was updated from trac-0.10.x to trac-0.11.
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/www/trac/Makefile?rev=1.34;content-type=text%2Fplain 

This is an incompatible upgrade for many of us who have Trac installations with clearsilver templates, clearsilver-dependent plugins, and other plugins not yet available for 0.11.

In ports/124885 it is suggested to repocopy the www/trac to www/trac10.
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=124885

However, currently there is no www/trac10 port, nor is there any mention about this incompatible upgrade in UPDATING!

Fernan

PS: Please CC <clsung@FreeBSD.org>, Trac's maintainer (the send-pr web interface @www.FreeBSD.org doesn't allow me to do that)
